training_plan.target_tier: Strong D1 (NC State, UNC, Georgia Tech, Michigan)

monday.am: Sprint technique (2000m) - 50 Free pace work, starts drill
monday.pm: Race pace sets (3500m) - 100 Free pace, hypoxic training

tuesday.pm: Dryland: Power training (45 min) - Olympic lifts, plyometrics

wednesday.am: Threshold training (3000m) - 100 Free pace, lactate sets

friday.am: Sprint work (2000m) - finish by 12:00 PM before Shabbat

saturday.note: Complete rest for physical and spiritual recovery

key_focus_areas.importance: Set up race with fast front half

friday_sunday.notes: Moderate carbs for Shabbat meals (challah, kugel)

race_week.race_day: Small carbs 2hr before, glucose between races

body_composition_targets.rationale: Match Kyle Chalmers / Caeleb Dressel build

primary_targets.rationale: Best match for current times + achievable progression

reach_targets.rationale: Require aggressive time drops but high upside

safety_targets.rationale: Already at or near recruiting standards

key_meets_for_recruiting.action: Email all target coaches 2 weeks before

key_meets_for_recruiting.importance: MOST IMPORTANT - final meet before early signing
key_meets_for_recruiting.action: Peak for this meet, all target coaches notified

january_2026: Update SwimCloud profile with recent times
march_2026: After FL Senior Champs, send updated times
Connect with Chabad contacts at each school
june_2026: Attend summer camps (UF Gator Camp, NC State)
july_2026: Follow up with all coaches after meet

talking_points: Can represent Israel at Olympics (smaller competition pool)
Israeli Olympic qualifying times more achievable than USA

email_templates.initial_outreach:
Subject: Michael Shapira - 6'4" Dual US-Israeli Citizen | Class 2027 | 50/100 Free

Coach [Name],

I'm reaching out to express my strong interest in [School] swimming. As a 6'4" sprinter from Satellite Beach, FL with dual US-Israeli citizenship, I'm following the path of athletes like Martin Kartavi and David Gerchik who've shown NCAA swimmers can compete internationally for Israel.

Current times (SCY):
• 50 Free: [current]
• 100 Free: [current]

Academic profile:
• GPA: 4.2
• Intended major: Engineering with Real Estate minor
• Orthodox Jewish - observant of Shabbat

I'll be competing at [upcoming meet] and would love to connect. I've attached my recruiting video and SwimCloud profile.

SwimCloud: swimcloud.com/swimmer/3250085

Best regards,
Michael Shapira
